TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sandra Mason ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 1, Sandra Mason, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1949) mrhuw Barbados ta' misuw hya' ga Sandra Mason, aring ryax tay 30 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1949 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: s~…ēan*ra mas~…ēon rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, s~…ēan*ra mas~…ēon, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤arő≤a*os~…ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēan*ra mas~…ēon, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun

(minhtuw sa kawas tay 1949) mrhuw Barbados ta' misuw hya' ga Sandra Mason, aring ryax tay 30 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1949 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
